title: monarda luteola
intro: Monarda luteola, also known as Lemon Bee Balm, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe digestive issues and ease respiratory problems. The health benefits of Monarda luteola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Monarda luteola include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicine or added to food and drinks for their flavor and medicinal properties.
